description: TensorRT FP16 engine for corn residue semantic segmentation at 512x768. Designed for Jetson Orin Nano; tested with NVIDIA L4T r35.4.
raw_docker_command: docker run -d --name unetpp_infer --runtime nvidia --gpus all --network host --ipc host --privileged -e NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES=all -e SHOW_WINDOW=1 -e DISPLAY=$DISPLAY -e ENGINE_PATH=/workspace/models/unetpp_teacher_512x768_fp16.engine --mount type=bind,source=/tmp/argus_socket,target=/tmp/argus_socket -v /tmp/.X11-unix:/tmp/.X11-unix -v /opt/models/unetpp:/workspace/models:ro habg21/unet-trt-infer:latest

compatibility.notes: Re-compile engine for Volta if needed.

description: TensorRT FP16 UNet++ with annotated RTSPS live stream for the ICICLE portal. Supports single or multi-CSI camera — portal injects STREAM_INGEST_URL or STREAM_INGEST_URL_0..N based on device camera count.
raw_docker_command:
docker run -d --name unetpp_infer_live --runtime nvidia --gpus all --network host --ipc host --privileged -e NVIDIA_DRIVER_CAPABILITIES=all -e SHOW_WINDOW=0 -e ENGINE_PATH=/workspace/models/unetpp_teacher_512x768_fp16.engine -e DETECT_EVERY_N_FRAMES=4 -e STREAM_FPS=8 -e STREAM_WIDTH=960 -e STREAM_HEIGHT=540 --mount type=bind,source=/tmp/argus_socket,target=/tmp/argus_socket -v /opt/models/unetpp:/workspace/models:ro habg21/unet-trt-infer-live:latest

# Multi-CSI (2+ cameras): add sensor indices + per-camera ingest URLs.
# On fleet deploy the portal injects these from device hardware setup — you do not add them to the model card.
docker run -d --name unetpp_infer_live --runtime nvidia --gpus all --network host --ipc host --privileged -e SHOW_WINDOW=0 -e ENGINE_PATH=/workspace/models/unetpp_teacher_512x768_fp16.engine -e CAMERA_INDICES=0,1 -e STREAM_INGEST_URL_0=rtsps://<ingest-host>/cam-<device_uid>-0 -e STREAM_INGEST_URL_1=rtsps://<ingest-host>/cam-<device_uid>-1 -e DETECT_EVERY_N_FRAMES=4 -e STREAM_FPS=8 --mount type=bind,source=/tmp/argus_socket,target=/tmp/argus_socket -v /opt/models/unetpp:/workspace/models:ro habg21/unet-trt-infer-live:latest

compatibility.notes: Single cam: STREAM_INGEST_URL injected on deploy. Multi-CSI: set camera count ≥ 2 in device hardware setup.
Re-compile engine for Volta if needed.

description: TensorRT UNet++ on Hikrobot GigE cameras via MVS SDK. Per-camera RTSPS push (Option B). Portal injects STREAM_INGEST_URL_0..N and CAMERA_INDICES on deploy.
raw_docker_command:
docker run --rm --runtime nvidia --gpus all --network host --privileged -v /opt/MVS:/opt/MVS:ro -v /opt/models/unetpp:/workspace/models:ro -e ENGINE_PATH=/workspace/models/unetpp_1x3x512x768_agx_xavier_jp4.engine -e CAMERA_INDICES=0,1,2 -e DETECT_EVERY_N_FRAMES=3 -e STREAM_FPS=5 -e STREAM_WIDTH=640 -e STREAM_HEIGHT=360 habg21/unet-mvs-unetpp-live:latest

# Fleet deploy: portal injects per-camera ingest URLs from device hardware (camera count + MVS indices).
# Manual test with 3 GigE cameras — replace <device_uid> and ingest host:
docker run --rm --runtime nvidia --gpus all --network host --privileged -v /opt/MVS:/opt/MVS:ro -v /opt/models/unetpp:/workspace/models:ro -e ENGINE_PATH=/workspace/models/unetpp_1x3x512x768_agx_xavier_jp4.engine -e CAMERA_INDICES=0,1,2 -e STREAM_INGEST_URL_0=rtsps://<ingest-host>/cam-<device_uid>-0 -e STREAM_INGEST_URL_1=rtsps://<ingest-host>/cam-<device_uid>-1 -e STREAM_INGEST_URL_2=rtsps://<ingest-host>/cam-<device_uid>-2 -e DETECT_EVERY_N_FRAMES=3 -e STREAM_FPS=5 -e STREAM_WIDTH=640 -e STREAM_HEIGHT=360 habg21/unet-mvs-unetpp-live:latest

compatibility.notes: Engine must be built on JP4 Xavier (TRT 7). MVS SDK required on host at /opt/MVS.
